name: histsync
description: Adds commands Claude Code runs on your behalf to your shell history.

hooks.command: command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'histsync: node is required but not installed. Install with: apt install nodejs (Debian/Ubuntu), brew install node (macOS). See https://github.com/ayakutt/claude-code-plugins/tree/main/plugins/histsync#requirements' >&2; exit 2; }; node ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/history-sync.js
